summary: Iteration 335 - Complete testing of Konekt B2B platform new features: Site Visit 2-stage workflow, Dashboard profit KPI, Credit Terms admin, Statement branded view, Product Upload Wizard, Group Deals, Settings Hub tabs, and Order status sales restriction. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for all major features.
seed_data_creation: Created test site visit during testing (TEST-REQ-* prefix) with full workflow progression through all stages
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 335 features verified working: 1) Site Visit 2-stage workflow fully functional with initiate→fee payment→schedule→in progress→findings→service quote flow. 2) Dashboard shows Profit (Month) KPI and Revenue & Profit Trend chart. 3) Customer Profile has Credit Terms section with Admin Only badge, toggle, term type, payment days, credit limit fields. 4) Statement page has branded view toggle (appears only when statement data exists). 5) Settings Hub Countries & Markets and Document Numbering tabs working. 6) Group Deals page loads with campaigns. 7) Product Upload Wizard accessible at /admin/vendor-ops/new-product. 8) Order status PATCH correctly returns 403 for sales role.

site_visit_workflow.ui_verified: SiteVisitsPage.jsx loads with stage filters and visit cards

dashboard_profit_kpi.ui_verified: Profit (Month) KPI card and Revenue & Profit Trend chart visible

credit_terms_admin.ui_verified: Credit Terms section with Admin Only badge, toggle, term type, payment days, credit limit, save button

statement_branded_view.ui_verified: Statement page loads, branded view toggle appears when statement data exists (uses CanonicalDocumentRenderer)

group_deals_admin.ui_verified: Group Deals page loads with campaigns list

settings_hub_tabs.ui_verified: Countries & Markets tab and Document Numbering tab both load correctly

order_status_restriction.verified: Sales role correctly blocked with 403, Admin role can update
